fuses.description: (P/WDW LH) Power Window Main Switch, Driver Safety Power Window Module, Rear Power Window Switch RH, Passenger Power Window Switch(RHD)
(P/WDW RH) Power Window Main Switch, Driver Safety Power Window Module. Rear Power Window Switch RH, Passenger Power Window Switch(LHD)
(O/S MIR HTD) ECM(M/T), PCM(A/T), A/C Control Module, Driver Power Outside Mirror, Passenger Power Outside Mirror
(FRT WIPER) Front Wiper Motor, Multifunction Switch (Wiper Switch)
(SAFETY P/W) Driver Safety Power Window Module
(A/BAG) Seat Belt Reminder Switch Module, SRS Control Module
(STOP LP) Stop Lamp Switch, Data Link Connector, P/WDW Relay
(PCU) Fuel Filter Warning Sensor, Air Flow Sensor, ECM(M/T), PCM(A/T)

(IGN 2) Head Lamp Leveling Switch, Incar Sensor, BCM. A/C Control Module, Sunroof Control Module, Head Lamp LH/RH, E/R Fuse & Relay Box(FFHS Relay, DRL Relay, Blower Relay), DSL Fuse & Relay Box(PTC 2 Relay, PTC 3 Relay)
(H/LP RH) Head Lamp RH, Instrument Cluster (Head Lamp ILL.)
(RR WIPER) Rear Wiper Motor, Multifunction Switch (Wiper Switch)
(S/HTD) Passenger Seat Warmer Switch, Driver Seat Warmer Switch
(TAIL LP RH) Head Lamp RH, Rear Combination Lamp RH, Illuminations
(TAIL LP LH) DRL Relay, License Lamp, Rear Combination Lamp LH, Head Lamp
(B/UP LP) Transaxle Range Switch (GAMMA), Back-Up Lamp Switch
(IGN COIL) Ignition Coil (KAPPA), Ignition Coil #1-#4(GAMMA), Condenser (GAMMA)
(ABS) ESP Switch Steering Angle Sensor, ABS Control Module, ESP Control Module, Yaw Rate Sensor, E/R Fuse & Relay Box (Multipurpose Check Connector)
(IGN1) Generator (KAPPA), EPS Control Module, Tire Pressure Monitoring Module
(TCU) Over Driver Switch, Pulse Generator "A", Pulse Generator "B", Vehicle Speed Sensor
(START) ECM(DSL), E/R Fuse & Relay Box (Start Relay, B/Alarm Relay)
(DR LOCK) T/Gate Unlock Relay, DR Lock/Unlock Relay, Dead Lock Relay
(ACC) Power Outside Mirror, Audio, Trip Computer

(ROOM) RR HTD Relay, Door Warning Switch, Instrument Cluster, RR HTD Relay, Door Warning Switch, Instrument Cluster, Trip Computer, Tire Pressure Monitoring Module, BCM, A/C Control Module, Luggage Lamp, Overhead Console Assembly, Front Room Lamp, Center Room Lamp
(BATT 2) I/P Junction (P/WDW RELAY, Fuse (SAFETY P/W 15A, HAZARD 15A))
(BATT 1) I/P Junction (TAIL RELAY, Fuse (S/ROOF 20A, FOLDING 10A, DR LOCK 20A, STOP LP 15A B/A HORN 15A, RR FOG LP 10A, FRT FOG LP 10A. Power Connector (ROOM 10A, AUDIO 20A))
(C/FAN) C/FAN HI Relay, C/FAN LOW Relay
(MAIN) Generator, Fuse (ABS 1 40A. ABS 2 40A, RR HTD 40A, BLOWER 40A, MDPS 80A, A/CON 1 10A)
(ABS 2) Multipurpose Check Connector, ABS Control Module, ESP Control Module
(ABS 1) Multipurpose Check Connector, ABS Control Module, ESP Control Module
(ECU A) ECM(M/T), PCM(A/T), Engine Control Relay(Main relay)
(SNSR 1) Camshaft Position Sensor, Canister Purge Control Solenoid Valve, Oxygen Sensor(Up,Down), Immobilizer Control Module, C/FAN LOW Relay, C/FAN HI Relay
(INJ) Injector #1~#4, Idle Speed Control Actuator, A/CON Relay, Oil Control Valve(GAMMA)
(BATT 2) I/P Junction (P/WDW RELAY, Fuse (SAFETY P/W 15A, HAZARD 15A))
(BATT 1) I/P Junction (TAIL RELAY, Fuse (S/ROOF 20A. FOLDING 10A, DR LOCK 20A, STOP LP 15A, B/A HORN 15A, RR FOG LP 10A, FRT FOG LP 10A, Power Connector (ROOM 10A, AUDIO 20A))
(C/FAN) C/FAN HI Relay, C/FAN LOW Relay
(MAIN) Generator, Fuse (ABS 1 40A, ABS 2 40A RR HTD 40A, BLOWER 40A, MDPS 80A, A/CON 1 10A)
(ABS 2) Multipurpose Check Connector, ABS Control Module, ESP Control Module
(ABS 1) Multipurpose Check Connector, ABS Control Module, ESP Control Module
(DSL) DSL Fuse & Relay Box (Glow Relay, PTC 1 Relay, PTC 2 Relay, PTC 3 Relay)
(ECU A) ECM(M/T), PCM(A/T), Engine Control Relay (Main relay)
(SNSR 1) Camshaft Position Sensor, Canister Purge Control Solenoid Valve, Oxygen Sensor (Up,Down), Immobilizer Control Module, C/FAN LOW Relay, C/FAN HI Relay
(INJ) A/CON Relay, Camshaft Position Sensor, VGT Actuator, EGR Actuator, Immobilizer Control Module, DSL Fuse & Relay Box (Glow Relay, PTC 1 Relay)
